title: Technology trend near-high multiplier sweep
hypothesis: The accepted Technology trend near-high haircut may be too punitive; lifting the multiplier from 0.25 to 0.50 could recover delayed winners while keeping the cohort de-risked.
summary: The best variant, 0.50, improved mid_weak and old_thin only slightly but regressed late_strong, with aggregate EV delta +0.0038 and PnL delta +0.81%; it failed Gate 4.
next_retry_requires: An orthogonal event, news, or lifecycle discriminator.
Material aggregate EV improvement, not nearby multiplier drift.
